zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB於1409年8月14日出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Thomas de Beaumont24歲，母親Philippa Maureward18歲。他和Johanna Darcy至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1460年7月10日在英國英格蘭越可爾堂頓享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB于1409年8月14日出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Thomas de Beaumont24岁，母亲Philippa Maureward18岁。他和Johanna Darcy至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1460年7月10日在英国英格兰越可爾堂頓享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB was born on 14 August 1409, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Beaumont, was 24 and his mother, Philippa Maureward, was 18. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Johanna Darcy. He died on 10 July 1460, in Towton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB est né le 14 août 1409, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Beaumont, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Philippa Maureward, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Johanna Darcy. Il est décédé le 10 juillet 1460, à Towton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB am 14. August 1409 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Beaumont 24 und seine Mutter Philippa Maureward 18. Er hatte mit Johanna Darcy mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Juli 1460 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Towton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB è nato il il 14 agosto 1409 nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Beaumont, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Maureward, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Johanna Darcy. Morì il 10 luglio 1460, nel Towton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KBが1409年8月14日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Beaumontは24歳，母Philippa Maurewardは18歳であった。彼はJohanna Darcyとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1460年7月10日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアトウトンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB(이)가 1409년 8월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Beaumont(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Maureward(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Johanna Darcy(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1460년 7월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 타우턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.14 August 1409–10 July 1460: 14 de agosto de 1409–10 de julho de 1460
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB nasceu em 14 de agosto de 1409, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Beaumont, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Maureward, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Johanna Darcy. Ele faleceu em 10 de julho de 1460, em Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Beaumont, 1st Viscount, KN, KB родился 14 августа 1409 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Beaumont было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Maureward, 18. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Johanna Darcy. Он умер 10 июля 1460 г. в местности тоутон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.14 August 1409–10 July 1460: 14 de agosto de 1409–10 de julio de 1460

Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Johanna Darcy. Murió el 10 de julio de 1460, en Towton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
